prompt_text:
### Demographics: 67-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 19 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: Rare nocturnal hypoglycemia (1 episode in 3 months); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3a (45-59)
Simple Steatosis
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Thyroid nodule (status post lobectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3a (45-59); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Simple Steatosis; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (younger sister)
- Social history: Current smoker (5 cigarettes/day for 10 years; ~2.5 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/week

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Nitrofurantoin (100 mg twice daily for prophylaxis)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 68.6 kg; Height 161.5 cm; BMI 26.3 kg/m²; Blood pressure 131/61 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 7.5%; 9 months ago 7.4%; 6 months ago 7.6%; 3 months ago 7.6%; current 7.8%), FPG (12 months ago 158mg/dL; 9 months ago 174mg/dL; 6 months ago 169mg/dL; 3 months ago 158mg/dL; current 159mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 70.2kg; 9 months ago 68.9kg; 6 months ago 71.1kg; 3 months ago 70.7kg; current 68.6kg), Height (12 months ago 161.5cm; 9 months ago 161.5cm; 6 months ago 161.5cm; 3 months ago 161.5cm; current 161.5cm), BMI (12 months ago 27.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 26.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 27.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 27.0kg/m²; current 26.3kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 129mmHg; 9 months ago 131mmHg; 6 months ago 130mmHg; 3 months ago 132mmHg; current 131mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 65mmHg; 9 months ago 65mmHg; 6 months ago 62mmHg; 3 months ago 62mmHg; current 61mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 58U/L; 9 months ago 63U/L; 6 months ago 58U/L; 3 months ago 64U/L; current 62U/L), AST (12 months ago 53U/L; 9 months ago 48U/L; 6 months ago 55U/L; 3 months ago 48U/L; current 52U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.0mg/dL; current 1.1mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 54mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 56mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 55mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 53mL/min/1.73m²; current 52mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 160mg/g; 9 months ago 159mg/g; 6 months ago 216mg/g; 3 months ago 156mg/g; current 261mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 76mg/dL; 9 months ago 75mg/dL; 6 months ago 77mg/dL; 3 months ago 81mg/dL; current 79mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 54mg/dL; 9 months ago 56mg/dL; 6 months ago 56mg/dL; 3 months ago 56mg/dL; current 55mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 145mg/dL; 9 months ago 160mg/dL; 6 months ago 144mg/dL; 3 months ago 144mg/dL; current 153mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 11.2g/dL; 6 months ago 11.0g/dL; 3 months ago 11.0g/dL; current 11.4g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
